dose: 4mg initially, then 2mg after each loose stool
doseAr: 4 ملغ في البداية — ثم 2 ملغ بعد كل إسهالة
notes: Maximum 16mg per day. Stop when stool normalises. Do NOT use if bloody stool or suspected invasive bacteria.

doseAr: كوب إلى كوبين (200–400 مل) بعد كل إسهالة
notes: ORS is the cornerstone of treatment — must be prescribed alongside any other agent. Sip slowly if nausea present. Can be made at home: 1 litre clean water + 6 teaspoons sugar + half teaspoon salt.

doseAr: 500 ملغ — مرة واحدة يومياً — بعد الأكل
notes: Preferred over ciprofloxacin in areas with high fluoroquinolone resistance. Take with food to reduce GI side effects.

doseAr: 500 ملغ — مرتين يومياً — بعد الأكل
notes: Alternative to azithromycin. Use ciprofloxacin if culture sensitivity confirms susceptibility. Avoid in pregnancy and children.

doseAr: 500 ملغ — ثلاث مرات يومياً — بعد الأكل
notes: Add this if amoebic dysentery or Giardia suspected — particularly travel-associated diarrhoea or contaminated water exposure. Advise patient to avoid alcohol completely during course and for 48 hours after.

doseAr: كوب إلى كوبين بعد كل إسهالة
notes: ORS remains essential even when antibiotics are prescribed.

doseAr: 50–100 مل لكل كيلو وزن على مدار 3–4 ساعات
duration: Until rehydrated, then 10ml/kg after each loose stool for maintenance
notes: Give by spoon or syringe if child refusing cup. Reassess hydration every 30 minutes. If child vomiting, give smaller more frequent amounts — 5ml every 2 minutes.

dose: 20mg once daily (children over 6 months) — 10mg once daily (under 6 months)
doseAr: 20 ملغ مرة يومياً للأطفال فوق 6 أشهر — 10 ملغ للأصغر
notes: WHO recommendation — reduces duration and severity of diarrhoeal episode and prevents recurrence for 2–3 months after. Continue for full 10 days even after diarrhoea has resolved.

doseAr: كيس إلى 3 أكياس يومياً — مذاب في كوب ماء كامل
duration: Until bowel movements normalise — typically 3–7 days
notes: Start with 1 sachet daily. Increase to 2–3 if no bowel movement within 48 hours. Take in the morning for best effect. Takes 24–72 hours to work — advise patient not to expect instant results.

dose: 15ml twice daily, adjust to produce 1–2 soft stools per day
doseAr: 15 مل مرتين يومياً — اضبط الجرعة للحصول على 1–2 براز ناعم يومياً
notes: Alternative if macrogol unavailable. Onset 24–48 hours. Common side effect: bloating and flatulence — warn patient. Can mix with juice to improve taste.

dose: 5–10mg at night (oral) — or 10mg suppository when rapid relief needed
doseAr: 5–10 ملغ عند النوم — أو تحميلة 10 ملغ عند الحاجة لتأثير سريع
notes: Oral bisacodyl acts in 6–12 hours — give at night for morning effect. Suppository acts in 20–60 minutes. Do not take within 1 hour of antacids or milk — reduces enteric coating efficacy. Can cause cramping — advise patient.

doseAr: 15–30 ملغ عند النوم — قرصان إلى 4 أقراص
notes: Alternative stimulant laxative. Same class as bisacodyl. May discolour urine yellow-brown — harmless. Avoid in pregnancy.

doseAr: كيس إلى كيسين يومياً — مذاب في كوب ماء
notes: Safe in all trimesters. Preferred first-line laxative in pregnancy. Adjust dose to achieve comfortable bowel habit without loose stools.

doseAr: 15 مل مرتين يومياً
notes: Safe in all trimesters. Second choice after macrogol — more bloating. Acceptable if macrogol unavailable.

doseAr: 15–30 ملغ كل 6–8 ساعات عند الحاجة
notes: Centrally acting — suppresses cough reflex. Best used at night to allow sleep. Do not use with MAOIs — serotonin syndrome risk. Many combination cold products contain dextromethorphan — check for duplication.

doseAr: 200–400 ملغ كل 4 ساعات عند الحاجة
notes: Expectorant — thins and loosens mucus. Add to dextromethorphan if cough is productive. Must be taken with a full glass of water. Many combination cough products contain both.

dose: 2 puffs (200 micrograms) every 4–6 hours as needed
doseAr: بختان (200 ميكروغرام) كل 4–6 ساعات عند الحاجة
duration: 5–7 days — reassess if requiring more than 3 times daily
notes: Use with spacer device for best lung delivery. Shake inhaler well before each use. Rinse mouth after if using high doses. Tachycardia and tremor are common side effects — advise patient.

doseAr: 15–30 ملغ كل 6–8 ساعات عند الحاجة
notes: Add for the cough component alongside salbutamol for the bronchospasm component.

dose: 15mg/kg per dose every 4–6 hours as needed for fever or discomfort — max 4 doses per day
doseAr: 15 ملغ لكل كيلو وزن — كل 4–6 ساعات عند الحاجة — لا تزيد عن 4 جرعات يومياً
duration: As needed — do not use continuously for more than 3 days without review
notes: For fever and discomfort associated with URTI. Not a cough treatment. Use age-appropriate formulation (drops, syrup, or tablet by age and weight).

dose: 2–3 drops in each nostril 3–4 times daily
doseAr: 2–3 نقاط في كل فتحة أنف — 3–4 مرات يومياً
notes: Isotonic saline nasal drops — safe at all ages including infants. Loosen nasal secretions and improve nasal breathing. Tilt head back slightly when instilling. Can use before feeds in infants.

doseAr: قرص 500 ملغ × 2 — كل 4–6 ساعات — لا تزيد عن 8 أقراص يومياً
duration: 5–7 days for musculoskeletal — 2–3 days for post-procedural
notes: Take regularly on a schedule for acute pain — do not wait for pain to peak. Patients over 50kg: full 1g dose. Under 50kg: 500mg–750mg per dose. Do not exceed 4g per day — hepatotoxicity risk.

doseAr: 400 ملغ — ثلاث مرات يومياً — بعد الأكل
notes: Take with or after food — reduces GI side effects. Maximum 1200mg per day OTC / 2400mg per day prescription. Add PPI (omeprazole 20mg daily) if at GI risk.

doseAr: 50 ملغ — ثلاث مرات يومياً — بعد الأكل
notes: More potent than ibuprofen for musculoskeletal and dental pain. Higher cardiovascular risk than ibuprofen — avoid in patients with hypertension, ischaemic heart disease, or stroke history.

doseAr: 1000 ملغ (قرصان 500 ملغ) — كل 6 ساعات بانتظام
notes: Combine paracetamol with NSAID for additive effect — they work by different mechanisms. Paracetamol taken regularly alongside NSAID gives better pain control than either alone at standard doses.

doseAr: 1000 ملغ — كل 6 ساعات بانتظام
notes: Base of the combination. Must be taken regularly — not PRN — for adequate pain control.

doseAr: 30–60 ملغ كل 4–6 ساعات عند الحاجة
duration: Maximum 3 days — do not continue beyond 5 days without specialist review
notes: Start with 30mg — increase to 60mg if inadequate. Contraindicated under 12 years. Avoid in breastfeeding. Common side effect: constipation — prescribe laxative if using for more than 2 days. Warn patient about drowsiness — do not drive.

doseAr: 1000 ملغ — كل 6 ساعات بانتظام
duration: Shortest effective duration — reassess after 3 days in pregnancy
notes: Only analgesic safe in all three trimesters. Use lowest effective dose for shortest time. Reassess if needing regular paracetamol for more than 3 consecutive days during pregnancy.

doseAr: 200 ملغ — مرتين يومياً — مع الأكل أو بعده
notes: Take at regular 12-hour intervals. Can be taken with or without food. Avoid in first trimester of pregnancy — folate antagonist. Check local resistance rates — if above 20% in your area, switch to nitrofurantoin.

doseAr: 100 ملغ (بطيء الإطلاق) — مرتين يومياً — مع الأكل
duration: 7 days (5 days if uncomplicated lower UTI and MR formulation confirmed)
notes: Must take with food — significantly improves absorption and reduces nausea. Urine turns dark yellow-brown — warn patient, this is harmless. Do not use if eGFR below 45 ml/min. Avoid from 36 weeks of pregnancy onwards.

doseAr: 500 ملغ — مرتين يومياً — بعد الأكل
duration: 7 days for lower UTI treatment failure — 7 days for outpatient pyelonephritis
notes: Take 2 hours before or 6 hours after dairy products, antacids, or iron supplements — these significantly reduce absorption. Avoid in pregnancy and children. Do not use as first-line — reserve for resistance or treatment failure. Tendon rupture risk — stop immediately if tendon pain or swelling.
